---
name: omg-hash-edit
description: "Hash-bound edit lane that verifies target digests, refreshes approvals on mismatch, and blocks mutation until evidence is valid."
---

# OMG Hash Edit Lane

- Channel: `enterprise`
- Execution modes: `embedded, local_supervisor`
- MCP servers: `omg-control`
- Evidence outputs: `.omg/evidence/hash-edit-{run_id}.json`
